positive: A symmetrical, central-composition design featuring stylized bioluminescent woodland fauna and flora. The main elements include glowing mushrooms, graceful geometric deer silhouettes, and winding, stylized vines. The overall style is a high-contrast blend of neo-art nouveau and psychedelic etching, rendered with clean, solid lines and deep detail. The color palette must be restricted to deep midnight blue, emerald green, amethyst purple, and sharp glowing cyan and gold accents, emphasizing bioluminescence. The composition must be perfectly isolated and scalable for apparel printing, designed with strong, clean silhouettes and sharp edges against a solid dark background. Highly detailed, intricate ink drawing, symmetrical design, high contrast, vector quality.
negative: blur, artifact, watermark, signature, text, low resolution, grain, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, disfigured, malformed, fuzzy, messy, out of focus, cropped, cluttered background
